title: Configurable logging format
body:
Some users would like to see customizable logging as an option for all Dapr containers, so they can ensure that output aligns with internal standards.

## In what area(s)?

/area runtime
/area operator
/area placement
/area injector
/area scheduler
/area sentry

## Release Note
RELEASE NOTE: **ADD** Configurable/customizable logging format.

comments.body: Hi, I'd like to work on this. Is it still available? Should this be one PR covering all 6 components or separate PRs?
